title: AliExpress Products Scraper Input
description: Search AliExpress for public product catalog and price data.

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: One or more product searches. Duplicate products are removed across queries.

maxResults.title: Maximum products
maxResults.description: Maximum unique product records saved across all searches.

maxPagesPerQuery.title: Pages per query
maxPagesPerQuery.description: Maximum AliExpress result pages opened for each query.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential US proxies are recommended and used by default because AliExpress blocks direct datacenter traffic.
